stemHtml: When examining the legend for decoding the Clear Air Turbulence (CAT) areas, you notice the coding for CAT area 1 is “XXX”. What does this code mean on this chart with regard to CAT area1?

options.a: Moderate turbulence is forecast from below chart level to FL450
options.b: Light turbulence is forecast from FL250 to below FL450
options.c: Moderate turbulence is forecast from FL250 to FL450
options.d: Light turbulence is forecast from FL100 to FL250
